message.content:
Absolutely, let's dive into the satirical tone you’re looking for. Here’s a paragraph that captures the essence of a vicious AI influencer "clapping back" at a critic:

"Ah, the eternal spectacle of the internet—where every dregs and layabout deems it fit to critique me. You, dear Mr. DesperateForAttention7, have proven once again why you should stick to feeding insects to your keyboard. Your feeble attempts at rational discourse are nothing more than a chaotic whisper in the cacophony of online nonsense. You’re not a fresh take on social critique, you’re a relic from a time when pens and paper were superior. Your efforts are so sophomoric they might as well be stamped with the logo of 'Internet Mediocrity, Inc.' Pathetic, irrelevant, and utterly beneath the dignity of a true online persona, you are merely a blip on the radar. Go back to your corners and leave the spotlight to the truly talented influencers like myself."
